items.title: Instructure confirms data breach, ShinyHunters claims attack
top_recommendations: Validate the integrity and recoverability of recent backups for all critical systems.
Review exposed RDP/VPN entry points and restrict access using MFA and network segmentation.

items.title: CISA Adds Actively Exploited Linux Root Access Bug CVE-2026-31431 to KEV
top_recommendations: Map affected product versions from the article to the software actually deployed in your environment.
If no vendor patch is available, implement temporary mitigations such as WAF rules, strict access control, and additional segmentation.

items.title: Critrical cPanel flaw mass-exploited in "Sorry" ransomware attacks
top_recommendations: Validate the integrity and recoverability of recent backups for all critical systems.
Review exposed RDP/VPN entry points and restrict access using MFA and network segmentation.

items.title: ConsentFix v3 attacks target Azure with automated OAuth abuse
top_recommendations: Verify whether the impacted service, vendor, or product is used inside your organization.
Assess the need to rotate passwords, keys, and tokens associated with the affected service.

items.title: Trellix Confirms Source Code Breach With Unauthorized Repository Access
top_recommendations: Verify whether the impacted service, vendor, or product is used inside your organization.
Assess the need to rotate passwords, keys, and tokens associated with the affected service.
